item.title: 通过门控语义质量多样性实现自我进化代理
item.summary: arXiv:2607.13683v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: An LLM agent's real-task performance is shaped as much by the harness around its model as by the frozen model itself: its prompts, injected knowledge, runtime control, and configuration.
